queries.question: Display country singers and bluegrass singers who play the piano.
queries.sql:
SELECT CountrySingers.singername
FROM Instruments JOIN CountrySingers ON Instruments.id = CountrySingers.foreignKey
WHERE Instruments.instrumentName = "Piano"
UNION
SELECT BluegrassSingers.singername
FROM Instruments JOIN BluegrassSingers ON Instruments.id = BluegrassSingers.foreignKey
WHERE Instruments.instrumentName = "Piano"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?instruments a :Instrument .
    ?countrysingers a :CountrySingers .
    ?countrysingers p:hasInstruments ?instruments .
    ?countrysingers p:singerName ?singername .
    ?instruments p:instrumentName ?instrumentname_f .
    FILTER(STR(?instrumentname_f) = "Piano")
    BIND(?singername AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?instruments a :Instrument .
    ?bluegrasssingers a :BluegrassSingers .
    ?bluegrasssingers p:hasInstruments ?instruments .
    ?bluegrasssingers p:singerName ?singername .
    ?instruments p:instrumentName ?instrumentname_f .
    FILTER(STR(?instrumentname_f) = "Piano")
    BIND(?singername AS ?o0)
  }
}
